lines.gurmukhi: ਪੇਖਨ ਸੁਨਨ ਸੁਨਾਵਨੋ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜੀਐ ਸਾਚੁ ॥
lines.translit: pekhan sunan sunaavano man meh drirreeai saach |
lines.english: See, hear, speak and implant the True Lord within your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਿ ਰਹਿਓ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਮੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਚੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: poor rahio sarabatr mai naanak har rang raach |2|
lines.english: He is all-pervading, permeating everywhere; O Nanak, be absorbed in the Lord's Love. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜੋ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: karan kaaran samarath prabh jo kare su hoee |
lines.english: The Cause of causes, the Almighty Lord God; whatever He wills, comes to pass.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har ek niranjan gaaeeai sabh antar soee |
lines.english: Sing the Praise of the One, the Immaculate Lord; He is contained within all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਪਾਤਾਲ ਦੀਪ ਰਵਿਆ ਸਭ ਲੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: khandd brahamandd paataal deep raviaa sabh loee |
lines.english: He pervades the continents, solar systems, nether worlds, islands and all worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਦਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh thaap uthaapadaa tis bin nahee koee |
lines.english: In an instant, He establishes and disestablishes; without Him, there is no other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਬੁਝਾਏ ਸੋ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਜਨੁ ਸੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis aap bujhaae so bujhasee niramal jan soee |1|
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the Lord Himself instructs; he alone is a pure and unstained being. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਚੰਤਿ ਜੀਅ ਰਚਨਾ ਮਾਤ ਗਰਭ ਅਸਥਾਪਨੰ ॥
lines.translit: rachant jeea rachanaa maat garabh asathaapanan |
lines.english: Creating the soul, the Lord places this creation in the womb of the mother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਿਮਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਹਾ ਅਗਨਿ ਨ ਬਿਨਾਸਨੰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: saas saas simarant naanak mahaa agan na binaasanan |1|
lines.english: With each and every breath, it meditates in remembrance on the Lord, O Nanak; it is not consumed by the great fire. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਖੁ ਤਲੈ ਪੈਰ ਉਪਰੇ ਵਸੰਦੋ ਕੁਹਥੜੈ ਥਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mukh talai pair upare vasando kuhatharrai thaae |
lines.english: With its head down, and feet up, it dwells in that slimy place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਕਤੁ ਬਿੰਦੁ ਕਰਿ ਨਿੰਮਿਆ ਅਗਨਿ ਉਦਰ ਮਝਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: rakat bind kar ninmiaa agan udar majhaar |
lines.english: From egg and sperm, you were conceived, and placed in the fire of the womb.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਧਣੀ ਕਿਉ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਓ ਉਧਰਹਿ ਜਿਸ ਦੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so dhanee kiau visaario udhareh jis dai naae |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, how could we forget the Master? Through His Name, we are saved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਰਧ ਮੁਖੁ ਕੁਚੀਲ ਬਿਕਲੁ ਨਰਕਿ ਘੋਰਿ ਗੁਬਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: auradh mukh kucheel bikal narak ghor gubaar |
lines.english: Head downwards, you abided restlessly in that dark, dismal, terrible hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤੂ ਨਾ ਜਲਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat too naa jaleh man tan ur dhaar |
lines.english: Remembering the Lord in meditation, you were not burnt; enshrine Him in your heart, mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਸੁਖੁ ਕਦੇ ਨਾਹਿ ਜਾਸਹਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਹਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: prabh bisarat sukh kade naeh jaaseh janam haar |2|
lines.english: Forgetting God, you shall never find peace; you shall forfeit your life, and depart. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਮ ਥਾਨਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਖਿਆ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: bikham thaanahu jin rakhiaa tis til na visaar |
lines.english: In that treacherous place, He protected and preserved you; do not forget Him, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਇਛਾ ਦਾਨ ਕਰਣੰ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਆਸਾ ਪੂਰਨਹ ॥
lines.translit: man ichhaa daan karanan sarabatr aasaa pooranah |
lines.english: He grants our hearts' desires, and fulfills all our hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੰਡਣੰ ਕਲਿ ਕਲੇਸਹ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਮਰਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਹ ਦੂਰਣਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khanddanan kal kalesah prabh simar naanak neh dooranah |1|
lines.english: He destroys pain and suffering; remember God in meditation, O Nanak - He is not far away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਣਹਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਤੈ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਈਐ ਨੇਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: habh rang maaneh jis sang tai siau laaeeai nehu |
lines.english: Love Him, with whom you enjoy all pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸਹੁ ਬਿੰਦ ਨ ਵਿਸਰਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਿਨਿ ਸੁੰਦਰੁ ਰਚਿਆ ਦੇਹੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so sahu bind na visrau naanak jin sundar rachiaa dehu |2|
lines.english: Do not forget that Lord, even for an instant; O Nanak, He fashioned this beautiful body. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਤਨੁ ਧਨੁ ਦੀਆ ਦੀਨੇ ਰਸ ਭੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo praan tan dhan deea deene ras bhog |
lines.english: He gave you your soul, breath of life, body and wealth; He gave you pleasures to enjoy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਤ ਬਨਿਤਾ ਸਾਜਨ ਸੇਵਕ ਦੀਏ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦੇਵਨ ਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: sut banitaa saajan sevak dee prabh devan jog |
lines.english: He gave you your children, spouse, friends and servants; God is the all-powerful Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮੰਦਰ ਰਥ ਅਸੁ ਦੀਏ ਰਚਿ ਭਲੇ ਸੰਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: grih mandar rath as dee rach bhale sanjog |
lines.english: He gave you households, mansions, chariots and horses; He ordained your good destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਹਿ ਵਿਜੋਗ ॥
lines.translit: har simarat tan man hariaa leh jaeh vijog |
lines.english: Meditating in remembrance on the Lord, the body and mind are rejuvenated, and sorrow departs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਰਮਹੁ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਭਿ ਰੋਗ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saadhasang har gun ramahu binase sabh rog |3|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, chant the Praises of the Lord, and all your sickness shall vanish. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੁਟੰਬ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਣੰ ਮਾਇਆ ਅਨੇਕ ਉਦਮਹ ॥
lines.translit: kuttanb jatan karanan maaeaa anek udamah |
lines.english: For his family, he works very hard; for the sake of Maya, he makes countless efforts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਭਾਵ ਹੀਣੰ ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਤੇ ਪ੍ਰੇਤਤਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har bhagat bhaav heenan naanak prabh bisarat te pretatah |1|
lines.english: But without loving devotional worship of the Lord, O Nanak, he forgets God, and then, he is a mere ghost. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚੀ ਰੀਤਿ ਸਾਂਈ ਸੇਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak sachee reet saanee setee ratiaa |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, that way of life is true, which inspires love of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਟੜੀਆ ਸਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਜੋ ਲਾਈ ਬਿਅੰਨ ਸਿਉ ॥
lines.translit: tuttarreea saa preet jo laaee bian siau |
lines.english: That love shall break, which is established with any other than the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬਿਸਰਤ ਤਨੁ ਭਸਮ ਹੋਇ ਕਹਤੇ ਸਭਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jis bisarat tan bhasam hoe kahate sabh pret |
lines.english: Forgetting Him, one's body turns to dust, and everyone calls him a ghost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨੁ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਬਸਨ ਨ ਦੇਵਹੀ ਜਿਨ ਸਿਉ ਸੋਈ ਹੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: khin grih meh basan na devahee jin siau soee het |
lines.english: And those, with whom he was so much in love - they do not let him stay in their home, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਅਨਰਥ ਦਰਬੁ ਸੰਚਿਆ ਸੋ ਕਾਰਜਿ ਕੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: kar anarath darab sanchiaa so kaaraj ket |
lines.english: Practicing exploitation, he gathers wealth, but what use will it be in the end?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈਸਾ ਬੀਜੈ ਸੋ ਲੁਣੈ ਕਰਮ ਇਹੁ ਖੇਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaisaa beejai so lunai karam ihu khet |
lines.english: As one plants, so does he harvest; the body is the field of actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਕਿਰਤਘਣਾ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਸਰਿਆ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਰਮੇਤੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: akirataghanaa har visariaa jonee bharamet |4|
lines.english: The ungrateful wretches forget the Lord, and wander in reincarnation. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ॥
lines.translit: salok |
lines.english: Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਦਾਨ ਇਸਨਾਨੰ ਅਨਿਕ ਸੋਧਨ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰਤਹ ॥
lines.translit: kott daan isanaanan anik sodhan pavitratah |
lines.english: The benefits of millions of charitable donations and cleansing baths, and countless ceremonies of purification and piety,

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਚਰੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਸਰਬ ਪਾਪ ਬਿਮੁਚਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aucharant naanak har har rasanaa sarab paap bimuchate |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, are obtained by chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har with one's tongue; all sins are washed away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਈਧਣੁ ਕੀਤੋਮੂ ਘਣਾ ਭੋਰੀ ਦਿਤੀਮੁ ਭਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: eedhan keetomoo ghanaa bhoree diteem bhaeh |
lines.english: I gathered together a great stack of firewood, and applied a tiny flame to light it.
